com._1c.v8.ibis.admin

Interface ISessionInfo


  • public interface ISessionInfo
    Infobase session description interface

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Abstract Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      String getAppId()
      Gets the ID of the application that started the session
      int getBlockedByDbms()
      Gets the number of the session that caused waiting for a transaction lock
      int getBlockedByLs()
      Gets the number of the session that caused waiting for a managed transaction lock
      long getBytesAll()
      Gets the total size of data transferred between the 1C:Enterprise server and the client application within this session
      long getBytesLast5Min()
      Gets the total size of data transferred between the 1C:Enterprise server and the client application within this session during the last 5 minutes
      int getCallsAll()
      Gets the total number of server calls from this session
      long getCallsLast5Min()
      Gets the total number of server calls from this session during the last 5 minutes
      String getClientIPAddress()
      Gets client IP address parameter
      UUID getConnectionId()
      Gets the session connection ID
      long getCpuTimeAll()
      Gets the cpu time total (in milliseconds)
      long getCpuTimeCurrent()
      Gets the cpu time period (in milliseconds)
      long getCpuTimeLast5Min()
      Gets the cpu time last 5 min (in milliseconds)
      String getCurrentServiceName()
      Gets current service Name (in milliseconds)
      String getDataSeparation()
      Gets data separation parameter
      long getDbmsBytesAll()
      Gets the total size of data sent to and received from the DBMS within this session
      long getDbmsBytesLast5Min()
      Gets the total size of data sent to and received from the DBMS within this session during the last 5 minutes
      String getDbProcInfo()
      Gets the DBMS connection ID (in the DBMS format)
      int getDbProcTook()
      Gets the duration (in milliseconds) of DBMS connection since it was selected by the session
      Date getDbProcTookAt()
      Gets the time when the DBMS connection was last selected by the session
      int getDurationAll()
      Gets the total duration of server call executions within this session
      int getDurationAllDbms()
      Gets the total duration of DBMS requst executions within this session
      int getDurationAllService()
      Gets the cpu time total (in milliseconds)
      int getDurationCurrent()
      Gets the time period (in milliseconds) that passed since the request execution was started, provided that the session is performing a server request
      int getDurationCurrentDbms()
      Gets the time period (in milliseconds) that passed since the request execution was started, provided that the session is performing a DBMS request
      int getDurationCurrentService()
      Get the execution time of services(in milliseconds)
      long getDurationLast5Min()
      Gets the total duration of server call executions within this session during the last 5 minutes
      long getDurationLast5MinDbms()
      Gets the total duration of database request executions within this session during the last 5 minutes
      long getDurationLast5MinService()
      Get the execution time of services last 5 min (in milliseconds)
      boolean getHibernate()
      Checks if session is in hibernate state
      int getHibernateSessionTerminationTime()
      Gets a timeout of hibernated seance termination
      String getHost()
      Gets the name or IP address of the computer that established the session
      UUID getInfoBaseId()
      Gets the ID of the infobase from which the session is established
      Date getLastActiveAt()
      Gets the date and time of the last session activity
      List<ILicenseInfo> getLicenses()
      Gets the list of licenses that the session uses
      String getLocale()
      Gets the locale ID
      long getMemoryCurrent()
      Gets memory size in bytes allocated by the current call
      long getMemoryLast5Min()
      Gets memory size in bytes allocated during the last 5 minutes
      long getMemoryTotal()
      Gets total allocated memory size in bytes
      int getPassiveSessionHibernateTime()
      Gets a timeout of passive seance hibernation
      long getReadBytesCurrent()
      Get memory size in bytes read from disk by the current call
      long getReadBytesLast5Min()
      Gets memory size in bytes read from disk during the last 5 minutes
      long getReadBytesTotal()
      Gets total memory size read from disk in bytes
      int getSessionId()
      Gets the session number, which an integer number unique among all of the infobase sessions
      UUID getSid()
      Gets the session ID
      Date getStartedAt()
      Gets the date and time when the session was opened
      String getUserName()
      Gets the name of the authenticated infobase user
      UUID getWorkingProcessId()
      Gets the ID of the working process that has an established connection, provided that the session is attached to the connection
      long getWriteBytesCurrent()
      Get memory size in bytes written by the current call to disk
      long getWriteBytesLast5Min()
      Gets memory size in bytes written during the last 5 minutes to disk
      long getWriteBytesTotal()
      Gets total memory size in bytes written to disk

    • Method Detail

      • getSid

        UUID getSid()
        Gets the session ID
        Returns:
        session ID

      • getAppId

        String getAppId()
        Gets the ID of the application that started the session
        Returns:
        application ID

      • getBlockedByDbms

        int getBlockedByDbms()
        Gets the number of the session that caused waiting for a transaction lock
        Returns:
        session number

      • getBlockedByLs

        int getBlockedByLs()
        Gets the number of the session that caused waiting for a managed transaction lock
        Returns:
        session number

      • getBytesAll

        long getBytesAll()
        Gets the total size of data transferred between the 1C:Enterprise server and the client application within this session
        Returns:
        data size

      • getBytesLast5Min

        long getBytesLast5Min()
        Gets the total size of data transferred between the 1C:Enterprise server and the client application within this session during the last 5 minutes
        Returns:
        data size

      • getCallsAll

        int getCallsAll()
        Gets the total number of server calls from this session
        Returns:
        number of server calls

      • getCallsLast5Min

        long getCallsLast5Min()
        Gets the total number of server calls from this session during the last 5 minutes
        Returns:
        number of server calls

      • getConnectionId

        UUID getConnectionId()
        Gets the session connection ID
        Returns:
        connection ID

      • getDbmsBytesAll

        long getDbmsBytesAll()
        Gets the total size of data sent to and received from the DBMS within this session
        Returns:
        data size

      • getDbmsBytesLast5Min

        long getDbmsBytesLast5Min()
        Gets the total size of data sent to and received from the DBMS within this session during the last 5 minutes
        Returns:
        data size

      • getDbProcInfo

        String getDbProcInfo()
        Gets the DBMS connection ID (in the DBMS format)
        Returns:
        DBMS connection ID (in the DBMS format)

      • getDbProcTook

        int getDbProcTook()
        Gets the duration (in milliseconds) of DBMS connection since it was selected by the session
        Returns:
        duration of DBMS connection

      • getDbProcTookAt

        Date getDbProcTookAt()
        Gets the time when the DBMS connection was last selected by the session
        Returns:
        time when the DBMS connection was last selected by the session

      • getDurationAll

        int getDurationAll()
        Gets the total duration of server call executions within this session
        Returns:
        total duration of server call executions

      • getDurationAllDbms

        int getDurationAllDbms()
        Gets the total duration of DBMS requst executions within this session
        Returns:
        total duration of DBMS request executions

      • getDurationCurrent

        int getDurationCurrent()
        Gets the time period (in milliseconds) that passed since the request execution was started, provided that the session is performing a server request
        Returns:
        time period (in milliseconds) that passed since the request execution was started, or 0 if the request is not being performed

      • getDurationCurrentDbms

        int getDurationCurrentDbms()
        Gets the time period (in milliseconds) that passed since the request execution was started, provided that the session is performing a DBMS request
        Returns:
        time period (in milliseconds) that passed since the request execution is started, or 0 if the request is not being performed

      • getDurationLast5Min

        long getDurationLast5Min()
        Gets the total duration of server call executions within this session during the last 5 minutes
        Returns:
        total duration of server call executions

      • getDurationLast5MinDbms

        long getDurationLast5MinDbms()
        Gets the total duration of database request executions within this session during the last 5 minutes
        Returns:
        total duration of database request executions

      • getHost

        String getHost()
        Gets the name or IP address of the computer that established the session
        Returns:
        name or IP address of the computer that established the session

      • getInfoBaseId

        UUID getInfoBaseId()
        Gets the ID of the infobase from which the session is established
        Returns:
        infobase ID

      • getLastActiveAt

        Date getLastActiveAt()
        Gets the date and time of the last session activity
        Returns:
        date and time of the last session activity

      • getLicenses

        List<ILicenseInfo> getLicenses()
        Gets the list of licenses that the session uses
        Returns:
        list of licenses

      • getLocale

        String getLocale()
        Gets the locale ID
        Returns:
        locale ID

      • getWorkingProcessId

        UUID getWorkingProcessId()
        Gets the ID of the working process that has an established connection, provided that the session is attached to the connection
        Returns:
        working process ID, or null if the session is not attached to the connection

      • getSessionId

        int getSessionId()
        Gets the session number, which an integer number unique among all of the infobase sessions
        Returns:
        session number

      • getStartedAt

        Date getStartedAt()
        Gets the date and time when the session was opened
        Returns:
        session opening date and time

      • getUserName

        String getUserName()
        Gets the name of the authenticated infobase user
        Returns:
        name of the authenticated infobase user

      • getHibernate

        boolean getHibernate()
        Checks if session is in hibernate state
        Returns:
        hibernation state

        int getPassiveSessionHibernateTime()
        Gets a timeout of passive seance hibernation
        Returns:
        passive seance hibernation timeout

      • getHibernateSessionTerminationTime

        int getHibernateSessionTerminationTime()
        Gets a timeout of hibernated seance termination
        Returns:
        hibernated seance termination timeout

        long getMemoryCurrent()
        Gets memory size in bytes allocated by the current call
        Returns:
        memory size in bytes allocated by the current call

      • getMemoryLast5Min

        long getMemoryLast5Min()
        Gets memory size in bytes allocated during the last 5 minutes
        Returns:
        memory size in bytes allocated during the last 5 minutes

      • getMemoryTotal

        long getMemoryTotal()
        Gets total allocated memory size in bytes
        Returns:
        total allocated memory size in bytes

      • getReadBytesCurrent

        long getReadBytesCurrent()
        Get memory size in bytes read from disk by the current call
        Returns:
        memory size in bytes read from disk by the current call

      • getReadBytesLast5Min

        long getReadBytesLast5Min()
        Gets memory size in bytes read from disk during the last 5 minutes
        Returns:
        memory size in bytes read from disk during the last 5 minutes

      • getReadBytesTotal

        long getReadBytesTotal()
        Gets total memory size read from disk in bytes
        Returns:
        total memory size read from disk in bytes

      • getWriteBytesCurrent

        long getWriteBytesCurrent()
        Get memory size in bytes written by the current call to disk
        Returns:
        memory size in bytes written by the current call to disk

      • getWriteBytesLast5Min

        long getWriteBytesLast5Min()
        Gets memory size in bytes written during the last 5 minutes to disk
        Returns:
        memory size in bytes written during the last 5 minutes to disk

      • getWriteBytesTotal

        long getWriteBytesTotal()
        Gets total memory size in bytes written to disk
        Returns:
        total memory size in bytes written to disk

      • getDurationCurrentService

        int getDurationCurrentService()
        Get the execution time of services(in milliseconds)
        Returns:
        the execution time of services (in milliseconds) or 0 if the request is not being performed

      • getDurationLast5MinService

        long getDurationLast5MinService()
        Get the execution time of services last 5 min (in milliseconds)
        Returns:
        service request time last 5 min (in milliseconds) performed

      • getDurationAllService

        int getDurationAllService()
        Gets the cpu time total (in milliseconds)
        Returns:
        service request time total (in milliseconds) performed

      • getCurrentServiceName

        String getCurrentServiceName()
        Gets current service Name (in milliseconds)
        Returns:
        current service Name (in milliseconds) performed

      • getCpuTimeCurrent

        long getCpuTimeCurrent()
        Gets the cpu time period (in milliseconds)
        Returns:
        cpu time period (in milliseconds) or 0 if the request is not being performed

      • getCpuTimeLast5Min

        long getCpuTimeLast5Min()
        Gets the cpu time last 5 min (in milliseconds)
        Returns:
        cpu time last 5 min (in milliseconds) performed

      • getCpuTimeAll

        long getCpuTimeAll()
        Gets the cpu time total (in milliseconds)
        Returns:
        cpu time total (in milliseconds) performed

        String getDataSeparation()
        Gets data separation parameter
        Returns:
        data separation

        String getClientIPAddress()
        Gets client IP address parameter
        Returns:
